zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Fitton II於1322年出生在英國英格蘭爾加福斯沃斯時，他的父親Thomas Fitton I45歲，母親Isabel Orreby43歲。他於1350年之前與Margaret Leigh在英國爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1396年3月22日在他的家鄉享年74歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Fitton II于1322年出生在英国英格兰爾加福斯沃斯时，他的父亲Thomas Fitton I45岁，母亲Isabel Orreby43岁。他于1350年之前与Margaret Leigh在英国爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1396年3月22日在他的家乡享年74岁。

nameMeanings.name: Fitton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Middle English fiton, fittin ‘lie, falsehood’, for a lier or cheat.

possibly a habitational name from Fitton Hall in Leverington, Cambridgeshire, named in Anglo-Scandinavian as ‘settlement by the meadow-land’, from Old English tūn + Old Norse fit, a term denoting grassland on the bank of a river.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Fitton II was born in 1322, in Gawsworth, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Fitton I, was 45 and his mother, Isabel Orreby, was 43. He married Margaret Leigh before 1350, in Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 22 March 1396, in his hometown, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Fitton II est né en 1322, à Gawsworth, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Fitton I, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Isabel Orreby, avait 43 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Leigh avant 1350, à Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 22 mars 1396, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 74 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Fitton II 1322 in Gawsworth, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Fitton I 45 und seine Mutter Isabel Orreby 43. Er hat vor 1350 in Cheshire, England Margaret Leigh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 22. März 1396 im Alter von 74 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Fitton II è nato il nel 1322 nel Gawsworth, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Fitton I, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Orreby, aveva 43 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Leigh prima del 1350, nel Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 22 marzo 1396, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 74 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Fitton IIが1322年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアガウスウオルスで生まれた時，父Thomas Fitton Iは45歳，母Isabel Orrebyは43歳であった。1350年以前にイギリスチェシュアイアでMargaret Leighと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1396年3月22日に故郷で74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Fitton II(이)가 1322년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 가w스워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Fitton I(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Orreby(은)는 43세였다. 그는 1350년 이전 영국 체실르에서 Margaret Leigh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1396년 3월 22일 그의 고향에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Fitton II nasceu em 1322, em Gawsworth, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Fitton I, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Orreby, tinha 43 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Leigh antes 1350, em Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 22 de março de 1396, em sua cidade natal, com 74 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Fitton II родился в 1322 г. в местности гавсворт, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Fitton I было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Orreby, 43. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Leigh перед 1350 г. в местности чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 22 марта 1396 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 74 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Fitton II nació en 1322, en Gawsworth, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Fitton I, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Isabel Orreby, tenía 43 años. Se casó con Margaret Leigh antes de 1350, en Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 22 de marzo de 1396, en su pueblo, a la edad de 74 años.
